data.title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan Slams 'Suffocating' Bureaucracy — Puts AI Front And Center With Leadership Reshuffle: 'Want To Roll Up My Sleeves…'
data.description: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan has announced a major leadership reshuffle, focusing on artificial intelligence and streamlining operations, as the company works to address past challenges and regain its competitive edge in the AI chip market.

data.title: Trump Admin Exempts US Exporters From China-Built Ship Fees Amid Industry Pushback
data.description: Trump exempts domestic shippers from port fees on China-built vessels, aims to boost US shipbuilding industry and counter Chinese influence.

data.title: Isaac Newton-inspired Crypto Defies Gravity, Soars 7600% Since The Year Began
data.description: A cryptocurrency project inspired by scientific great Isaac Newton has quietly made waves this year, with its native coin's year-to-date explosion leaving reputable names far behind.

data.title: Trump's Tech Chief Claims US Can 'Manipulate' Time And Space
data.description: White House Science and Technology Director claims U.S. has technology to manipulate time and space in speech promoting American innovation and tech sector.

data.title: Nearly 4 Million Manufacturing Jobs Are Opening As Boomers Retire—But Gen Z Is Not Interested
data.description: US manufacturing jobs expected to grow by 3.8 million by 2033, but Gen Z shows low interest due to low pay, safety concerns, and preference for trades.
